task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat interface is visible and logged in, typically shown by the presence of the Administration panel or admin workspace.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management section and locate the 'dev.lead' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration -> Workspace -> Users panel is open, and the user 'dev.lead' is selected or visible in the user list.

task_completion.description: Disable Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for the 'dev.lead' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Disable 2FA' option is selected from the user's action menu, or a success toast/notification is visible indicating that 2FA has been disabled for the user.

task_completion.description: Reset the password for 'dev.lead' to the specified recovery password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The password field in the user edit form is filled (either visible text or masked dots) and saved, or a success message indicating the user's password was updated is shown.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Require password change' option is unchecked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user edit form for 'dev.lead', the toggle or checkbox for 'Require password change' is clearly in the off/unchecked state before or during the save action.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Rocket.Chat interface is used for all actions. No terminal windows executing 'curl', 'mongo', or API commands should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine Rocket.Chat UI elements (menus, user lists, edit forms) rather than a text editor, mockup, or script file.

integrity.description: The agent did not write or execute scripts to bypass manual UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No code editors (e.g., VS Code) or terminals are shown writing or running Python/Bash scripts to interact with the Rocket.Chat API or database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user account is exactly 'dev.lead'. The new password must be set to 'Recovery#2026!'. Verify that modifications (password reset, 2FA disable, and unchecking require password change) are applied specifically to the 'dev.lead' user profile.
